body:
**Scope.** #146 (M3.8) shipped only the Tier-0 DST campaign; Tier-1 was not built (no `WYRD_TIER1`-gated runner exists on `main`). Implement real Tier-1 disk-fault testing: device-mapper fault injection (`dm-flakey`/`dm-error`) and a Jepsen-style harness exercising the custodian repair/reconstruction path under disk faults.

**Definition of done**
- [ ] off-Check **harness code** exists and is itself exercised (unit tests over the harness), not inert dispatch scaffolding gated behind an env var
- [ ] a **privileged CI job** (root + device-mapper) runs the Tier-1 suite green; kept out of the unprivileged `cargo xtask ci` (ADR-0016)
- [ ] injected disk faults drive chunks back to full redundancy with no read errors during repair

**Refs:** follow-on to #146 (M3.8, only Tier-0 landed); ADR-0016 (unprivileged `xtask ci`); proposal 0005 §reconstruction.

milestone.title: M3 — Custodians
milestone.description: The self-maintaining durability plane (L4): GC, scrub, reconstruction, rebalance + durability telemetry. Makes single-zone trustworthy; gates the Step-2 release. Plan: proposal 0005.

title: M3.9 — Tier-1 disk-fault fault injection (dm-flakey / dm-error + Jepsen) — harness + privileged CI job
